summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MJV Labs premium landing page. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend displays correctly with all sections, interactive service panels, contact form integration working, and mobile responsiveness functional. No critical issues found.
passed_tests: Contact form submission (/api/contact) - saves to MongoDB with proper response structure
Contact form retrieval (/api/contact) - returns submissions correctly
Status check creation (/api/status) - working with UUID generation
Hero section loads with split layout and floating UI elements (mobile app card, stats card, code snippet)
Navigation links work correctly (Services, Work, Process, Contact) with proper URL updates
Service strip shows 3 interactive panels (Websites $750, Apps $2500, Full Builds Custom) with hover effects
What We Build bento grid displays with mobile app mockup, dashboard, and website preview
Process timeline displays 3 steps (Discovery, Design & Build, Launch) on dark background
Built for Operators section shows split layout with image and content
Contact form displays all fields (name, email, company, message) and submits successfully
Contact form resets after successful submission
Mobile responsive navigation works with hamburger menu
All CTA buttons (hero primary/secondary, navigation) are clickable
Service panel hover interactions work with background color changes and image overlays
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
